name: Motivational Mantras
description: A collection of short, powerful mantras to boost your motivation and focus. Perfect for a quick mental reset during the day.
author: David Ralph

quotes.quote: Mistakes are an opportunity to grow.
Sometimes you win, sometimes you learn.
Mistakes are expected, inspected, and corrected.
If what I’m doing isn’t working, then what I’m doing has to change.
Today, I will try something new.
Practice makes progress.
Mistakes are how I learn.
Whatever happens, I’ll handle it.
This is tough but so am I.
Everyone makes mistakes, that's why pencils have erasers.
Where there’s a will, there’s a way.
I am capable.
Do your best and learn from your mistakes.
The expert in anything was once a beginner.
Let’s make better mistakes tomorrow.
Limits exist only in my mind
If you need more time, you just need more time.
I will achieve great things through small steps
Every mistake is an opportunity for growth
I’m willing to put in the work to make my dreams a reality
